## Checklist

- [ ] Gates pass locally: `cargo test`, `cargo clippy`, `cargo fmt`
- [ ] Guard scripts pass locally: `bash scripts/*.sh` (english-source, catalog sync, and the other guards)
- [ ] English-only (docs, comments, commit message)
- [ ] docs/site updated if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] No version bumps — versions come from release tags
